sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89768" key="prosmu/romai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσμύρομαι</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῡ]</pron>, <sense id="n89768.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">make tearful lament in answer to</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ποταμῷ π. πηγή</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.362.23</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
